impersonating: ^I’m looking for a suspect named Seymour Orion in this crime.
^Umm, I don’t know anybody named Seymour Orion… What did he do?
^I’m going to need to search your house to find him. We have a warrant. Can I come in?
^I don't know. I still don't want you coming inside
wrong_address: ^It doesn't matter. I have a warrant for your arrest.
^Ummm. I don't think I want to let you in.
no_signature: ^Helloo? It's V.A.M.P.I.R.E, you've gotta let me in.
^Huh? I didn't do anything wrong. I'm not opening the door!
^I've got a warrant! That means you have to let me in!
^Alright, well I didn't want it to come to this.
impersonating_two: ^Hey this is the police. Open up.
^Yep. We have reason to believe a suspect is hiding in your house.
^What? I don't know anybody that would commit a crime? My family, we're all very law-abiding!
^In that case, just let us in to do a quick sweep.
^... Okay fine. You'll see none of us have done anything wrong.
no_warrant: ^Hey. I'm going to need to come in.
^Wait. Don't you vampires need my permission?
^You think you know V.A.M.P.I.R.E code better than me?
